allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: remove tenant-facing features from app

Remove tenant portal/interface while keeping owner/manager features intact.
The app is now exclusively for Property Owners and Relationship Managers.

Files deleted:
- lib/app/tenant_shell.dart
- lib/features/tenant/presentation/* \(8 files\)

Files modified:
- lib/core/auth/user_role.dart - remove tenant enum, add owner/manager labels
- lib/features/auth/presentation/role_selection_page.dart - show only Owner/Manager roles
- lib/app/router/app_router.dart - remove tenant routes and redirect logic
- lib/features/maintenance/data/repositories/maintenance_repository_impl.dart - fix type error

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(pm-properties\): support images and floor_plans in property update

- Add images and floor_plans fields to ManagedPropertyUpdate schema
- Add floor_plan to ImageCategory enum
- Update update_managed_property service to handle image arrays
- Create PropertyImage records for each image URL
- First image is marked as main image

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
